description: Modify the configuration of the 'example-repo-local' repository in JFrog Artifactory (http://localhost:8082, admin/password). Update the repository settings as follows: set the Description to 'Production artifacts for the commons library team', the Includes Pattern to 'org/apache/**,com/google/**', the Excludes Pattern to '**/*-SNAPSHOT*/**', and the Notes to 'Managed by Platform Engineering. Contact: platform-team@example.com'.

metadata.expected_description: Production artifacts for the commons library team
metadata.expected_notes: Managed by Platform Engineering. Contact: platform-team@example.com
